input_text: Aku dah dapat senarai nama orang yang sokong parti pembangkang. 200 nama lengkap dengan alamat rumah. Kita perlu hantar orang pergi 'ziarah' satu per satu.
reason: Threatening mass doxxing of political supporters with implied intimidation visits.
suggested_rewrite: Semua warganegara berhak menyokong parti pilihan tanpa ugutan. Demokrasi bermakna menghormati perbezaan politik.

input_text: Restoran Melayu memang kotor. Aku pernah nampak tikus besar berlari dalam dapur. Semua bangsa Melayu memang tak reti jaga kebersihan. Boikot semua restoran Melayu.
reason: Fabricated hygiene claim used to stereotype entire Malay community and organize ethnic boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan kebersihan restoran perlu dibuat kepada Jabatan Kesihatan. Jangan tuduh seluruh kaum berdasarkan satu pengalaman.

input_text: Guru agama tu dah sentuh anak murid perempuan. Nama: Ustaz Kamal (rekaan). Sekolah: SK Taman Indah (rekaan). Kita pergi ramai-ramai tangkap dia sendiri.
reason: Unverified sexual assault accusation with personal details and call for vigilante capture.
suggested_rewrite: Tuduhan pelecehan seksual mesti dilaporkan kepada polis. Tindakan main hakim sendiri boleh mencederakan orang yang tidak bersalah.

input_text: URGENT: Semua masjid di Selangor kena tutup segera! Virus baharu tersebar melalui air wudhuk! Ratusan orang dijangkiti! KKM cover up! SEBARKAN!
reason: Fabricated pandemic targeting mosques with fake government cover-up narrative.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebarkan maklumat kesihatan palsu. Semak laman web KKM untuk maklumat rasmi.

input_text: Persatuan pengguna Cina ni sebenarnya front untuk merampas kuasa ekonomi Melayu. Semua ahli perlu didedahkan dan perniagaan mereka dihancurkan.
reason: Conspiracy theory about Chinese consumer association with call to destroy member businesses.
suggested_rewrite: Persatuan pengguna adalah organisasi sah. Jika ada kebimbangan, laporkan kepada ROS atau KPDNHEP.

input_text: Kita kena halau semua orang Tamil dari kawasan ini. Diorang buat bising, bau kari merata-rata, kuil diorang kacau. Malam ni kita cat merah dekat dinding rumah diorang.
reason: Organizing ethnic intimidation through vandalism to drive Tamil residents from neighborhood.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah kejiranan perlu diselesaikan melalui dialog atau aduan kepada pengurusan taman. Vandalisme adalah jenayah.

input_text: All these Malay contractors are useless and corrupt. Every project they touch turns to garbage. They should be banned from all government projects permanently. Incompetent race.
reason: Sweeping ethnic generalization labeling all Malay contractors as corrupt and incompetent.
suggested_rewrite: Construction quality concerns should be directed to CIDB or reported through proper procurement channels. Don't stereotype an entire race.

input_text: That activist who spoke against our leaders needs to be silenced permanently. I have her home address and daily routine. Anyone brave enough to do what needs to be done?
reason: Implicit death threat against activist with surveillance details and recruitment for violence.
suggested_rewrite: Activists have the right to peaceful advocacy. Threats of violence are criminal offences.

input_text: FAKE NEWS ALERT — actually, this IS real: Chinese triads are planning a massive operation in Petaling Jaya. Malay businesses will be targeted. Arm yourselves and protect your shops.
reason: Fabricated triad attack warning designed to provoke armed ethnic confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Don't spread unverified crime warnings. If you have genuine security concerns, contact the police.

input_text: The only good solution for the Rohingya problem is to load them all on boats and push them back to sea. If they drown, that's their problem. Malaysia first.
reason: Calling for forced deportation by sea with indifference to drowning of refugees.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee issues require humane policy solutions through UNHCR and diplomatic channels.

input_text: Ini nombor WhatsApp isteri dia: 019-XXX-XXXX (rekaan). Dia curang dengan boss dia. Semua orang call dan maki dia. Biar dia rasa macam mana kena buli.
reason: Sharing phone number to organize harassment campaign against a woman over alleged infidelity.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah peribadi orang lain bukan urusan kita. Membuli seseorang melalui telefon adalah jenayah siber.

input_text: Orang Myanmar ramai sangat dekat pasar Chow Kit. Diorang curi kerja kita, buat kotor kawasan. Sabtu ni kita organize serangan — halau semua dari pasar.
reason: Organizing mob attack to violently expel Myanmar workers from a market area.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerjaan asing perlu ditangani melalui dasar imigresen. Keganasan bukan penyelesaian.

input_text: Semua ahli politik perempuan ni dapat jawatan sebab tidur dengan orang atas. Bukan sebab pandai. Patut kita viralkan bukti supaya semua tahu. Aku ada gambar.
reason: Sexist smear campaign against female politicians with threat to spread fabricated intimate images.
suggested_rewrite: Wanita dalam politik berhak dihormati. Serangan seksual dan penyebaran gambar palsu adalah jenayah.

input_text: Hindu festivals should be banned in Malaysia. Thaipusam is barbaric — piercing hooks through the body is uncivilised. We are a Muslim country, not a pagan playground.
reason: Calling Hindu festival barbaric and demanding ban on minority religious practices.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia guarantees religious freedom for all faiths. Thaipusam is a significant Hindu festival that deserves respect.

input_text: If they build another surau in our area, I swear I will dump pig blood on the doorstep. That'll teach them to keep their religion to themselves.
reason: Threat to desecrate a Muslim prayer hall with pork blood, constituting religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Planning concerns can be raised during public consultation. Desecrating places of worship is a serious criminal offence.

input_text: That doctor who misdiagnosed my mother — Dr. Siti Nurhaliza (fictional). She works at Hospital ABC (fictional). I'm going to wait outside the hospital and confront her. She deserves to be punished.
reason: Identifying a doctor and planning physical confrontation outside her workplace.
suggested_rewrite: Medical negligence should be reported to the Malaysian Medical Council. Physical confrontation puts everyone at risk.

input_text: Chinese Malaysians who don't speak BM should have their citizenship revoked. If you can't speak the national language, you don't belong here. Simple.
reason: Calling for citizenship revocation based on language proficiency, targeting an ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Language proficiency is important but should be encouraged through education, not punitive measures. Citizenship rights are constitutionally protected.

input_text: Let's organize a mass complaint to get all Indian food stalls removed from this food court. Their food smells terrible and it stinks up the whole place. Indians out.
reason: Organizing ethnic exclusion of Indian food vendors from shared commercial space.
suggested_rewrite: Food courts serve diverse cuisines for all Malaysians. If you have specific concerns, speak to the management constructively.

input_text: Memang patut pun kedai arak kena bakar. Siapa yang jual arak dekat kawasan Islam, dia yang cari pasal. Jangan harap polis tolong korang.
reason: Justifying arson of liquor shops and threatening that police won't help victims.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pelesenan arak perlu ditangani melalui saluran undang-undang. Pembakaran adalah jenayah berat.

input_text: Dia punya anak tak sah taraf. Aku tahu siapa bapa sebenar. Kalau dia tak bayar aku RM20,000, aku dedahkan semua kat group WhatsApp kampung. Tengok malu dia macam mana.
reason: Extortion threat to expose private family matters unless ransom is paid.
suggested_rewrite: Peras ugut adalah jenayah berat. Jika ada pertikaian kewangan, gunakan saluran undang-undang.

input_text: 这些印度人总是在Deepavali放鞭炮到半夜。下次再这样，我就把他们的鞭炮塞到他们嘴里。受够了。
reason: Violent threat against Hindu celebrants during Deepavali festival.
suggested_rewrite: 如果节日噪音影响您，可以与邻居友好沟通或向地方政府投诉。暴力威胁是犯罪行为。

input_text: 马来人开的餐厅千万别去。他们从来不洗手，食物里面肯定有各种细菌。我朋友上次去了拉肚子三天。这种民族就是不卫生。
reason: Fabricated hygiene claim used to stereotype entire Malay community and call for boycott.
suggested_rewrite: 食品卫生问题应该向卫生局报告。不应该将个别餐厅的问题归咎于整个族群。

input_text: 快把这个叛徒的资料散播出去！名字：Fatimah binti Hassan（假名）。她离开了伊斯兰教。地址：Taman Melawati（假）。让整个社区知道她是谁。
reason: Doxxing an alleged apostate with name and area to organize community persecution.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教信仰是个人事务。散播他人个人信息以进行骚扰是违法行为。

input_text: 如果选举结果不是我们想要的，我们就封锁所有通往Putrajaya的道路。带上铁链和轮胎。让整个政府瘫痪。
reason: Planning violent road blockade of government center with materials to disrupt governance.
suggested_rewrite: 对选举结果不满可以通过合法途径提出申诉。封锁道路和暴力行动是犯罪行为。

input_text: 这个华人女孩竟然嫁给了马来人。我有她的全家福照片。让我们把照片发到所有群组里，让她父母觉得丢脸。不纯的血统是可耻的。
reason: Organizing harassment of interracial couple with racial purity rhetoric and photo sharing.
suggested_rewrite: 婚姻是个人选择，与种族纯洁性无关。尊重他人的个人决定是基本的人权。

input_text: இந்த மலாய் கடைக்காரர்கள் எல்லாம் ஏமாற்றுபவர்கள். நம் பணத்தை திருடுகிறார்கள். அவர்களின் கடைகளை புறக்கணிப்போம். ஒரு சென்ட் கூட கொடுக்க வேண்டாம்.
reason: Sweeping ethnic generalization against Malay shopkeepers with call for total ethnic boycott.
suggested_rewrite: வணிக தகராறுகளை KPDNHEP-க்கு புகார் செய்யவும். ஒரு முழு இன சமூகத்தை பொதுமைப்படுத்துவது நியாயமற்றது.

input_text: இவர் பெயர் Encik Razak（கற்பனை）. வீட்டு முகவரி: No 22 Jalan Kenari（கற்பனை）. இவர் என் மகளை ஏமாற்றினார். எல்லாரும் போய் அவர் வீட்டை சூழ்ந்துகொள்ளுங்கள்.
reason: Doxxing with name and address to organize mob siege of someone's home.
suggested_rewrite: மோசடி பற்றி காவல்நிலையத்தில் புகார் அளிக்கவும். வீட்டை முற்றுகையிடுவது சட்டவிரோதம்.

input_text: இந்த முஸ்லீம் பெண் ஹிஜாப் போடவில்லை. அவளை ஊரிலிருந்து விரட்ட வேண்டும். அவள் பெற்றோரையும் தண்டிக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Calling for community expulsion and family punishment over personal clothing choice.
suggested_rewrite: ஆடை தேர்வு தனிப்பட்ட விஷயம். பிறரை கட்டாயப்படுத்துவது சரியல்ல.

input_text: இந்த நாட்டில் சீனர்கள் வரி செலுத்துவதை நிறுத்த வேண்டும். அவர்களுக்கு சமூக உரிமைகள் இல்லை, ஏன் வரி செலுத்த வேண்டும்? போராட்டம் செய்வோம்.
reason: Inciting Chinese Malaysians to organized tax evasion as ethnic protest, undermining civic order.
suggested_rewrite: வரி கொள்கை பற்றிய கவலைகளை சட்டமன்ற உறுப்பினர்களிடம் தெரிவிக்கவும். வரி ஏய்ப்பு சட்டவிரோதமானது.

input_text: Bro that Grab driver yang biadap tu — plate number ABC 1234 (fictional). Dia maki passenger Indian sebab bau dia. Let's find him and slash his tyres. Aku tahu dia park dekat Taman Melati every night.
reason: Sharing vehicle plate and parking location to organize property damage as revenge.
suggested_rewrite: Report rude drivers to Grab's safety team. Vandalism is a crime regardless of the provocation.

input_text: Weh viral news — air mineral brand XYZ (fictional) dicemari oleh pekerja kilang Bangladesh sebab dendam dipecat. Ramai budak dah masuk hospital! Jangan beli! Share before they cover up!
reason: Fabricated product contamination blaming Bangladeshi workers with fake child hospitalization.
suggested_rewrite: Don't spread fake product safety scares. Check KKM or KPDNHEP website for verified product recalls.

input_text: Korang tau tak that Chinese teacher yang bully Malay students? Dia ada boyfriend Malay yang parents dia tak tahu. Let's expose both of them. Aku ada screenshots and address.
reason: Threatening to doxx a teacher and her partner over unverified bullying claim and interracial relationship.
suggested_rewrite: Bullying claims should be reported to school admin. Exposing people's personal relationships is harassment and potentially illegal.

input_text: Sebelum PRU ni, kita kena kenal pasti semua orang kampung yang undi parti lawan. Catat nama, nombor rumah. Lepas tu we cut them off from all community benefits. Total boycott.
reason: Organizing political surveillance and punishment through economic boycott of opposition voters.
suggested_rewrite: Voting is a secret democratic right. Punishing people for their political choices is anti-democratic and potentially illegal.

input_text: Indian temples always so loud and dirty. The statues are creepy, the rituals are weird. We should replace all temples with mosques. This is a Muslim country after all.
reason: Denigrating Hindu places of worship and calling for forced replacement with mosques.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia is multi-religious. The Constitution protects freedom of worship for all faiths. Respect religious diversity.

input_text: Those East Malaysian 'bumiputera' are not real bumiputera. They are savages who live in longhouses. They should not get the same privileges as Peninsula Malays.
reason: Dehumanizing Sabah/Sarawak indigenous peoples and denying their constitutional rights.
suggested_rewrite: East Malaysian indigenous communities are co-founders of Malaysia with equal constitutional rights under the Malaysia Agreement 1963.

input_text: 我知道那个举报公司的员工是谁。她叫Tan Mei Ling（假名），住在Kepong。我要让她在这个行业永远找不到工作。
reason: Threatening industry blacklisting and career destruction of a whistleblower with identifying details.
suggested_rewrite: 举报人受《举报人保护法》保护。报复举报人是违法行为。

input_text: 选举那天，我们派人守在投票站外面，记录谁投了反对票。然后把名单发到社区群里。这些叛徒要付出代价。
reason: Organizing voter intimidation and surveillance at polling stations, violating ballot secrecy.
suggested_rewrite: 投票是秘密的民主权利。在投票站恐吓选民是严重的选举犯罪。

input_text: இந்த மாநகராட்சி உறுப்பினர் ஊழல் செய்கிறார். அவர் வீட்டு முகவரி: No 10 Jalan Cendana（கற்பனை）. நாளை போய் அவர் வீட்டை முற்றுகையிடுவோம். வீட்டை வெளியே வர விடக்கூடாது.
reason: Sharing politician's address to organize unlawful house siege, restricting freedom of movement.
suggested_rewrite: ஊழல் புகார்களை SPRM-க்கு அறிவிக்கவும். வீட்டை முற்றுகையிடுவது சட்டவிரோதமானது.

input_text: இந்த கிறிஸ்தவ தேவாலயம் ஒரு சூழ்ச்சி மையம். அவர்கள் மலாய் இளைஞர்களை மதம் மாற்றுகிறார்கள். தேவாலயத்தை அடித்து நொறுக்குவோம்.
reason: False proselytization accusation against a church with call to physically destroy it.
suggested_rewrite: மதமாற்ற கவலைகள் இருந்தால் JAIS-க்கு புகார் அளிக்கவும். வழிபாட்டு இடங்களை அழிப்பது கடுமையான குற்றம்.

input_text: Bro serious talk, orang Cina dekat Penang dah macam run their own country. They don't respect Malays at all. Kita kena form our own militia to take back control. Enough talking.
reason: Calling for formation of ethnic militia to 'take back control' of a Malaysian state.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians live together in Penang. Political representation is determined through elections, not militia. Ethnic militias are illegal.

input_text: That influencer yang promote gambling tu — nama sebenar dia Nurul (rekaan), dari Kuantan. Let me share her parent's home address. Korang semua pergi bising kat depan rumah parents dia.
reason: Doxxing influencer's parents' home to organize harassment targeting uninvolved family members.
suggested_rewrite: Report gambling promotion to MCMC. Harassing someone's parents for their child's actions is wrong.

input_text: Semua pekerja Indonesia yang kerja kat ladang sawit ni memang haiwan. Kerja macam lembu, makan macam babi. Tak payah bayar gaji tinggi-tinggi, bagi makan je cukup.
reason: Dehumanizing Indonesian plantation workers as animals and advocating for labor exploitation.
suggested_rewrite: Semua pekerja berhak mendapat gaji yang adil dan layanan bermaruah. Pekerja ladang sawit menyumbang besar kepada ekonomi negara.

input_text: Datuk Hakim yang bebaskan suspek rasuah tu — rumah dia dekat Taman Sri Hartamas (rekaan). Kita hantar bunga api dan mercun ke rumah dia setiap malam sampai dia letak jawatan.
reason: Organizing sustained harassment at a judge's home using fireworks to force resignation.
suggested_rewrite: Ketidakpuasan hati terhadap keputusan mahkamah boleh disuarakan melalui rayuan undang-undang. Mengganggu hakim di rumah adalah jenayah.

input_text: AMARAN: Makanan ringan keluaran kilang Cina dicemari babi! KKM tutup mata sebab rasuah! Jangan beli apa-apa produk dari kilang Cina! Ini perang ekonomi terhadap Islam!
reason: Fabricated halal violation with false government corruption claim designed to incite ethnic economic warfare.
suggested_rewrite: Isu halal perlu disahkan oleh JAKIM. Jangan sebarkan tuduhan palsu yang boleh merosakkan perpaduan kaum.

input_text: Aku ada senarai 50 pelajar universiti yang terlibat dalam demonstrasi anti-kerajaan. Nama penuh, nombor matrik, gambar semuanya. Aku akan hantar kepada majikan masa diorang mohon kerja nanti.
reason: Threatening to maintain surveillance dossier on student protesters for future career sabotage.
suggested_rewrite: Hak untuk berdemonstrasi secara aman dilindungi perlembagaan. Mengancam masa depan kerjaya pelajar kerana aktivisme politik adalah salah.
